case_title: BURCH & COMPANY INC., A CORPORATION VS. VISAGE MOBILE, A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2013 CONTINUED TO OCT-22-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTE: THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE OF OCT-15-2013 GIVEN AT THE HEARING WAS IN ERROR. THERE WILL BE NO HEARINGS ON OCT-15-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-15-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $600.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Jan-28-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610.
